name: @omadia/channel-sdk
description: Channel SDK for byte5 Harness — contracts shared by every channel plugin (Teams, Slack, Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, custom webhooks). Defines ChannelPlugin / CoreApi / IncomingTurn / ChannelUserRef / PlatformIdentity. Semantic outgoing-message contracts and channel-agnostic store interfaces land here incrementally as connector packages extract them.
